meta.title: Fogon — Your kitchen, organized
meta.description: Organize your kitchen as a couple. Real-time shopping list, pantry tracking, recipe collection, and weekly meal planning.

hero.description: The collaborative kitchen app for couples and families. Shopping list, pantry, recipes — all synced in real time.

shoppingList.title: Collaborative shopping list
shoppingList.description: Add items, check them off at the store. Changes sync instantly between you and your partner.

mealPlanning.title: Meal planning
mealPlanning.description: Plan your weekly meals with a simple calendar. Know what to cook every day.

pantry.title: Shared pantry
pantry.description: Track what you have at home. When something runs out, it moves to the shopping list automatically.

recipes.title: Recipe collection
recipes.description: Save your recipes, browse curated ones, and add ingredients to your list with one tap.

smartAdd.title: Smart auto-add
smartAdd.description: Mark an item as empty in your pantry and it appears in the shopping list. No more forgetting.

step1.title: Create your household
step1.description: Sign up and set up your shared kitchen space.

step2.title: Invite your partner
step2.description: Share a code and start collaborating instantly.

step3.title: Start cooking together
step3.description: Add items, plan meals, and never wonder what's in the fridge again.
